title: Middle Eastern Lamb Tagine
description: A rich and flavorful Moroccan-inspired stew made with tender lamb, aromatic spices, and dried fruits.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until caramelized, about 8 minutes.
Add garlic and ginger; cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add lamb; cook, stirring occasionally, until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add cumin, cinnamon, and paprika; cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add raisins and honey; stir to combine.
Add 1 cup of water; bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low; cover and simmer, stirring occasionally, until lamb is tender, about 1 1/2 hours.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
